title: Data Utils
description: Datapack Utilities to aid in data pack creation!
body:
# Datapack Utilities

  This is Datapack Utilities - a data pack that can aid in the creation of data packs. As of `0.2.0 [release]`, it has three main modules to it, those being `Scoreboard Value Library`, `Entity Positioning System`, and `Useful Function Tags`. **To learn more about them, as well as how to use them as a data pack developer, please see their respective pages on [GitHub](https://github.com/TheBaruch4/DataUtils/wiki)**

# Important Info - Make Sure To Read This!

You may use this data pack to aid you in the creation of data packs (I mean, that's literally why it exists). However, I ask that you link to **this Modrinth page** for users of your data pack to download DataUtils and not provide an alternate download page for DataUtils.

You may make changes to this data pack to add/change things in it as you wish. If you'd like, you can send me the changes that you've made on Discord, and (if I approve of them), they'll be added into the main data pack. You will be credited on this page (unless you object to that, in which case you should let me know, and I won't put your name here).

If you have any questions about anything to do with the pack, feel free to ask on [my discord](https://discord.gg/TkFb7V8Bya).
